title: The Criminal Procedure Code (Amendment), 2022.( Act No. 22 of  2022)

sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Criminal Procedure Code Short title
sections.text:
(Amendment) Act, 2022 and shall be read as one with the Criminal Cap.88
Procedure Code, in this Act referred to as the principal Act.

sections.heading: Section 9 (6) of the principal Act is amended by the deletion Amendment

imprisonment”.
